meaning: adj.使消除的,使解除警戒心的
examples: Leonard approached with a disarming smile.
They outlined their aims with disarming frankness.
We will agree to disarming troops and leaving their weapons at military positions.
Which brings me back to the National Rifle Association, and the danger of disarming.
With a disarming twinkle he adds, "It is hard to know how to safeguard against this!"
